author: jpcranford
description: Detects TTRPG dice notation (d6, 2d8, d100…) in the first column of table headers and auto-fills the first column with evenly distributed roll ranges. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: jpcranford
manifest.description: Detects TTRPG dice notation (d6, 2d8, d100…) in the first column of table headers and auto-fills the first column with evenly distributed roll ranges.
manifest.name: Dice Table Calculator

name: Dice Table Calculator

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Cleaned up code for Obsidian linters.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added a few different algorithms in the settings to deal with remainders. You can now choose between bottom and top weighted or spreading the remainder evenly by alternating (default) or subtle top-weight.
